name: browser-pet-extension
description: Context-aware browser pet extension using clawd-pet SVGs.

scripts.build: export PATH=node_modules/esbuild/bin:$PATH; mkdir -p dist assets dist/wasm dist/options dist/onboarding && esbuild main_world.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/main_world.js --format=iife --legal-comments=none --minify --loader:.css=text && esbuild content.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --format=iife --legal-comments=none --minify --loader:.css=text && esbuild background.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js --format=iife --platform=browser --external:fs --external:path --external:url --external:sharp --external:onnxruntime-node --legal-comments=none --minify --loader:.css=text && esbuild offscreen.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/offscreen.js --format=iife --platform=browser --external:fs --external:path --external:url --external:sharp --external:onnxruntime-node --legal-comments=none --minify --loader:.css=text && esbuild popup/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/popup/popup.js --format=iife --legal-comments=none --minify --loader:.css=text && esbuild options/options.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/options/options.js --format=iife --legal-comments=none --minify --loader:.css=text && esbuild onboarding/onboarding.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/onboarding/onboarding.js --format=iife --legal-comments=none --minify --loader:.css=text && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp offscreen.html dist/ && cp -r assets dist/ && cp node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/ort-wasm-simd-threaded.wasm dist/wasm/ && cp node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/ort-wasm-simd-threaded.mjs dist/wasm/ && mkdir -p dist/popup && cp popup/popup.html popup/popup.css dist/popup/ && cp onboarding/onboarding.html onboarding/onboarding.css dist/onboarding/ && cp options/options.html options/options.css dist/options/ && cp shared.css dist/
scripts.build:firefox: npm run build && mkdir -p dist-firefox && cp -R dist/. dist-firefox/ && cp manifest.firefox.json dist-firefox/manifest.json
